testcase.name: testQuery
testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionUtils.fail(AssertionUtils.java:34) at org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.fail(Assertions.java:119) at QueryManagerTest.testQuery(QueryManagerTest.java:68) at java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:498) at java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1259) at java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1259)
testcase.system-out: setUpClass() sys.default.path.config = D:/GGC_Maven_Systems GCASys_DBF 172.16.0.14 0F3DF529201885A6531F730120593059 GGC_BM001 Connecting to 172.16.0.14 GCASys_DBF GMC_SEG09 IntegSys GGC_BM001 GMC_SEG09 DBA6A83E015307C1095EB022A4217AF8 91BAAE7C67F5C5C5D90E21451F664EF4 91BAAE7C67F5C5C5D90E21451F664EF4 toDate:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss 2016-01-20 00:00:00 toDate:yyyy-MM-dd 2005-06-02 logUser(String fsProductID, String fsUserID) M001000001 SELECT a.*, IFNULL(b.sDeptIDxx, '') sDeptIDxx, IFNULL(b.sEmpLevID, '') sEmpLevID FROM xxxSysUser a LEFT JOIN Employee_Master001 b ON a.sEmployNo = b.sEmployID WHERE a.sUserIDxx = 'M001000001' -----testQuery()----- Server is not the default server of the branch...
